title: FOOD PANTRY - 211info
text: UNION COUNTY SENIOR CENTER FOOD PANTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides fresh produce and bread product program. Also offers a food pantry with easy-to-prepare items. 1504 N Albany Street La Grande, OR 97850 Eligibility: Food Pantry: Household income must be at or below 300% federal poverty level and have limited or no access to cooking facilities Harvest Share: Unrestricted Hours: Food Pantry: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1:30pm-4:30pm Harvest Share: Wednesday 8am, Friday 1:30pm (until capacity is reached) (541) 963-7532 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 963-7532 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Food Pantry: Call or walk in to talk to office staff to access pantry Harvest Share: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Union County Services: Food Pantries * Homelessness Issues Fresh Food Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY FACILITIES/CENTERS - SENIOR CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. UNION COUNTY SENIOR CENTER
